ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT ROSE, ANN MARIE MARTIN, ROGER
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES,

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROSE, ANN MARIE MARTIN, ROGER THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 755 O'FARRELL STREET APT. 34, LEASE FORFEITED, WRIT TO ISSUE BUT ACTUAL EVICTION STAYED UNTIL 1/15/95, PLT. TO RETAIN SECURITY DEPOSIT OF $450.00, EA. SIDE TO BEAR THEIR OWN ATTORNEY'S FEES, COSTS AND EXPENSES RELATED TO THIS ACTION. EA. PARTY WAIVED ANY CLAIMS FOR DAMAGES INCL. ALL RIGHTS UNDER SECTION CC 1542
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
